svg.title: RNA-seq QC Pipeline DAG
svg.desc: Directed acyclic graph showing the four-stage Snakemake pipeline: generate reads per sample, filter reads, count k-mers, then aggregate into a report.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the generate_reads rule in this Snakemake pipeline')

sendPrompt('Explain the filter_reads rule in this Snakemake pipeline')
sendPrompt('Explain the count_kmers rule in this Snakemake pipeline')
sendPrompt('Explain the count_kmers rule in this Snakemake pipeline')
sendPrompt('Explain the count_kmers rule in this Snakemake pipeline')
sendPrompt('Explain the report rule in this Snakemake pipeline')
